{% extends 'base.html' %} {% block body %}
{% include 'partials/nav.html' %}

{{ report.title or ('CLEOC Report #' ~ report.id) }}

Officer: {{ report_owner.display_name }}
Status: {{ report.status }} {% if report.submitted_at %}| Submitted {{ report.submitted_at.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M') }}{% endif %} {% if report.graded_at %}| Graded {{ report.graded_at.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M') }}{% endif %} {% if report.returned_at %}| Returned {{ report.returned_at.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M') }}{% endif %}
Back to CLEOC {% if can_edit_report %} Continue Editing {% endif %}
{% if can_edit_report %}
This report is still editable by the report owner. Once submitted, the report becomes read-only until a grader returns it for corrections.
{% elif report.user_id == user.id %}
This report is read-only. You can review grader feedback below, but you cannot change the submitted copy unless it is returned for corrections.
{% endif %}
{% for page in page_summaries %}
{{ page.page_label }}{% if page.has_annotations %} - Review Notes Added{% endif %}
Last updated {{ page.updated_at.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M') if page.updated_at else '' }}
{% if can_edit_report %} Open Page {% endif %}
{% if page.fields %}
{% for field in page.fields %} {% endfor %}
Field Value Review Notes
{{ field.label }}
Field {{ field.idx + 1 }}
 {{ field.value or 'No entry recorded.' }} {% if field.annotations %} {% for annotation in field.annotations %}
{{ annotation.severity.replace('_', ' ') }}
{{ annotation.note }}
{% endfor %} {% else %} No issues flagged. {% endif %} {% if can_grade_report %} {% endif %}
{% else %}
No saved fields on this page yet.
{% endif %}
{% else %}
No CLEOC pages have been saved for this report yet.
{% endfor %}
{% if can_grade_report %}

Grade Mock Report

Queued Field Flags
No field notes queued yet.
{% endif %}

Review History

{% if grades %}
{% for grade in grades %}
{{ grade.disposition }} {{ grade.created_at.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M') }}
Grader: {{ grade.grader.display_name if grade.grader else grade.grader_id }}
{% if grade.score is not none %}
Score: {{ grade.score }}
{% endif %} {% if grade.summary %}
Summary: {{ grade.summary }}
{% endif %} {% if grade.officer_notes %}
Officer notes: {{ grade.officer_notes }}
{% endif %}
{% endfor %}
{% else %}
No grades or review actions have been saved yet.
{% endif %}
{% endblock %}
